          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Population: 29. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Nova.
The equipment_failure changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Year 90 on Mars. Critical equipment malfunction. Morale is hopeful. We have 252 food units left.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 90): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
